title: SCP-811, Swamp Woman
description: A female humanoid anomaly that lives in swamps and attacks with toxic sweat.
body:
Swamp Woman adds a new entity. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-811, also known as The Swamp Woman.


SCP-811 appears as a female humanoid living in swamps, adapted to murky water and swamp environments. SCP-811 can be docile when it has eaten before, otherwise it will be aggressive towards players and will attack with Acid Sweat which it produces from it's skin. Not only is the Acid Sweat dangerous, but SCP-811 can also dash towards players, giving it an unpredictable behavior and danger to Swamp or Mangrove biomes.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-811 spawn?

SCP-811 can spawn in swamps or mangroves on the surface during night like a normal monster. However, there can only one instance of SCP-811

</details>



![SCP-811](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/546d29e8e30ed8551976731779214744de3e6b3f.png)

SCP-811 is a female humanoid with long black hair, elongated limbs, swamp-green skin, and a swollen abdomen. It spawns during nighttime in swamp and mangrove biomes and cannot drown, making it perfectly suited for water. When SCP-811 is not submerged, it constantly emits particles of black sweat. Any player that collides with SCP-811 immediately suffers wither damage from direct contact. SCP-811 becomes aggressive when hungry or provoked, hunting nearby animals or players to feed. While out of water and in an aggressive state, it can also spit acid that harm players from a distance. It can also dash forward if aggressive. Its behavior makes swamp exploration at night extremely dangerous.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
